homepage.description: RED Komodo FPV Drone √ Arri Alexa Drone Berlin √ Skilled Pilot with over 15 years of experience from Germany and Spain √ Inspire 3 - Booking FPV Pilot Germany
homepage.text_excerpt:
Arri Alexa Drone | Professional aerials from Berlin | SKYNAMIC Aerial Filming
Zum zweiten Video
Arri Alexa drone company from Berlin, Germany flying a wide range of cinematic lenses
Heavy lifting drones not only fit the highest demands in aerial cinematography they also require pilots with a trained skillset. As we are filmmakers by heart we love to fly all kinds of cinema lenses such as Standard Primes, Ultra Primes, Highspeed Primes, Anamorphic Kowa or heavy Cooke glases. The goal is always to match the style the DoP asks us for to tell the story. Welcome in our world of possibilities – Please always feel free to
drop us a line
with your project and your special needs – Julian Gloeckner is always on your service.
Flying custom camera rigs for commercial and feature films
More over we can provide VR 360° rigs such as Insta360 Titan and GoPro Omni alike. Or carrying big LED lights for videos like the
O2 visual net
In whole Europe we take care of all necessary permits.
We have our Spanish Department based in
Barcelona
to offer professional service. So there is no need for expensive batterie and equipment transport.

about.text:
ARRI Drone - Cinema Cameras in the air | SKYNAMIC Aerial Filming
Pictures in our minds, flying in our hearts.
Fast, precise, dynamic – benchmarks for today’s aerial filming and benchmarks we set ourselves. We utilize the latest technology in aerial filmmaking to reach the ultimate goal and fulfill our passion: Capture unique images that tell a story! To realize that goal, piloting skills are essential. Our
award winning Skynamic Pilots
look back at 10 years of flight experience in the RC Model sector. Our
Team
includes filmmakers and photographers, which means that we all speak the same visual language.
In order to view the video, you must agree to personal data being transmitted to YouTube or Vimeo.

products.text:
The Best Drone - Team in Germany | SKYNAMIC Aerial Filming
We want to change something.
We believe that “Close Range Aerial Filming” will play the key role on how to use camera drones now and in the future! We strive for dynamic movement close above ground, we want to chase fast cars or fly perfect circles around motifs. We are a crane, a dolly, a steadycam and a helicopter.
FPV HD livestream for TV broadcast
Drone
pictures make an event more tangible for the viewer! On the projector or directly at home. We offer livestreaming via SDI directly to the broadcasting van. We are able to stream an uncompressed FullHD signal  up to 1 km range, with a flight time up to 18min, depending on the system. Several drones teams are available for an event. The newest trend is indoor flights at smaller and bigger events. With our custom-build sub 150g drone
we are allowed to fly over crowds in indoor venues
Skynamic FAQ
10 minutes preparation on set
Flight time 4-20 Minutes, depending on the system
Battery change within one minute
Worldwide use with flexible drone systems and permits
Operation ceiling: 3600m above sea level
Pilots with many years of experience
Redundant drone systems on set
Pilot Licenses for Europe, Morocco and many more
Worldwide insurance cover
3x HD Video transmitters for Liveview
Self-sufficient power source via own electric generator
19″ SUMO Client monitor
